overview: Our team develops a Microsoft Office Word ribbon tool specifically designed for technical writing.
The tool empowers writers to effortlessly insert figures and equations into their Word documents.
Users also have the flexibility to adjust settings such as text wrapping and cross-referencing for enhanced usability.
For more information, visit the WEGO website.
longTermGoals: Our primary objective is to refine our current ribbon tool through testing.
Additionally, we aim to commercialize this tool, with plans to implement a trial system for users and develop a web application for hosting.
